changeSet.author: microfina-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM AGENCE WHERE CODE_AGENCE = 'NKC') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM AGENCE WHERE CODE_AGENCE = 'NDB') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.comment: Seed banques, comptes, comptabilité et opérations bancaires de démonstration (SQL Server).
